faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal services throughout Westfield, NJ. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on the nest size and location. faqs.answer: Our wasp removal service includes a thorough property inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Westfield?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven techniques that are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during treatment. faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Westfield, NJ?
faqs.answer: Westfield properties commonly face issues with yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities and wall voids, while paper wasps build exposed nests under eaves and porches. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and safely removing all wasp species found throughout Union County.
